---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect you can reliably reproduce
title: "[bug]: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages and stack traces if any.

## Environment

- QuestKit version: e.g. `0.1.0`
- Package(s) affected: e.g. `@questkit/react`, `workers/api`
- Node version: `node -v`
- pnpm version: `pnpm -v`
- OS: e.g. macOS 14.5, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04
- Browser (if relevant): e.g. Chrome 129

## Logs / screenshots

Paste any relevant logs (please scrub secrets) or attach screenshots.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — recent changes, workarounds you have tried,
related issues.
